direction.summary: Patch notes and admin updates only; no market outlook or directional thesis given.
direction.quote: The next (several) week(s) will be focused on: Getting LDPM V.2 into the graphs on the Dashboard

notes: Admin-only report (Patch Notes & Updates dated 2024-03-11): dashboard fixes, macro report fixes, data processing updates. No market commentary at all.

direction.summary: VoEx divergence with QQQ leaving stability plus negative GTM print signal persistent near-term downside for both indexes.
direction.conditions: VoEx Variance still stable suggests downside should be short-lived; if data appears in Propagation Zone, time-horizon re-evaluated.
direction.quote: Overall, high expectations for near-term downside.

levels.quote: the purchasing support just below the 12th, 13th, and 14th rests at ~$435

notes: The $435 level is referenced as last week's purchasing support that Friday's red open pushed price below; only numeric level in report.

direction.summary: Despite surprise bullish week, QQQ VoEx divergence complete and negative GTM prints keep downside the most likely outcome.
direction.conditions: SPY VoEx Spike hints at possible BUPO; if affirmed by QQQ or neo-VoEx, bearish stance would soften.

notes: Author acknowledges last week's bearish call was wrong (market rallied) and calls the data 'messy'; still maintains bearish lean.

direction.summary: VoEx in Propagation Zone for both indexes, rising gamma squeezes, negative GTM, bearish LDPM crossovers; downside expected to continue.
direction.conditions: Watching VoEx for forming bull-traps; spontaneous IV reductions could push price toward gamma-neutral upside path.
direction.quote: Overall, bearish inclinations persist and strengthen.

direction.summary: Medium-term downside intact but VoEx paused at Propagation Line; near-term risk of flat-to-mean-reverting bounce tempers aggressive shorting.
direction.conditions: If Monday looks bullish, take short profits on near-dated positions; VoEx pause raises risk of flat-to-bullish week.
direction.quote: some caution on “hitting the gas” on continued shorting due to VoEx’s pause for the early-part of the week, but overall the outlook remains the same: bearish

direction.summary: VoEx well inside Propagation Zone and VoEx Variance printing there too; expects continued downside despite risk of a dead-cat bounce.
direction.conditions: Subtle VoEx Divergence and supportive hedging suggest a flat-to-greenish bounce; until VoEx leaves Propagation Zone, interpretation stays down.
direction.quote: Overall, increased risk for flat-bounce but overall outlook remains steady and bearish.

notes: Latter part of report is Dashboard feature preview (admin content); market thesis anticipates navigating soft-bullish/flat waters within a bearish outlook.

direction.summary: Bounce expected to continue this week (supportive hedging, VoEx-daily moving to stability) but viewed as temporary within larger downtrend.
direction.conditions: Unconvinced it is more than a bounce; watch VoEx-daily and LDPM/LDPS for downside resuming; VoEx Variance still in Propagation Zone.
direction.quote: continuation of the bounce is prudently warranted for the week ahead, with a close eye on VoEx and LDPM/LDPS

notes: Main points state 'high potential for another bounce but unconvinced its anything more' — near-term bullish call inside a maintained bearish regime.

direction.summary: Near-term bullish continuation expected (green-to-flat week) but flagged as a likely bull-trap with medium-term bearish expectations intact.
direction.conditions: VoEx-daily in Stability while VoEx remains in Propagation Zone equals bull-trap; benefit fades if IV rises.
direction.quote: Continued outlook for bullish performance in the near-term with continued expectation for longer-term downside.

levels.quote: the purchasing support only providing a narrow reprieve from more selling pressure located around ~$430

notes: Header is mislabeled 'Weekly Chat 04/29/2024' (same date as previous week's report) but content is clearly the following week's review. The $430 level appears in prior-week narrative.

direction.summary: VoEx sped into Inhibition Zone with supportive hedging and positive GTM; continued local bullish performance expected, cautiously.
direction.conditions: neo-VoEx technically still in Propagation Zone; put-sellers not participating; full bullish call reserved until neo-VoEx exits PZ.
direction.quote: Overall, continued cautious bullish outlooks without full commitment to overtly bullish ideologies.

direction.summary: More price appreciation expected but data mixed; SPY VoEx stalled at Inhibition Line and author leans toward possible bull-trap.
direction.conditions: If QQQ VoEx reverses to rejoin SPY, or GTM goes negative, or put-sellers stay absent, bull-trap interpretation takes over.
direction.quote: Overall, bullish but leaning towards bull trap.

notes: Includes admin content on Trading Robot Beta 2.0 and dashboard patch; mixed SPY/QQQ VoEx signals (same direction call, differing conviction), not an opposite split.

direction.summary: Near-term dip expected (negative GTM, rising gamma squeezes, inactive put-sellers) within a maintained medium-term bullish outlook; buy-the-dip framing.
direction.conditions: Pullback seen as buy-the-dip given VoEx moving toward stability; rising DLP activity would prompt increasing long exposure.
direction.quote: Overall, bearish on the near-term, still tentatively bullish on all other timeframes.

notes: Split-horizon call: coming week bearish dip, medium-term bullish. Also announces LTA release and neo-VoEx transition (admin content).

direction.summary: VoEx turned sharply toward Propagation Zone, sell-dominant hedging, deeply negative GTM; prolonged downside now the prudent bet.
direction.conditions: If QQQ IV drops further it gains reasonable purchasing support; otherwise turbulence angled to the downside.

levels.quote: the purchasing support doesn’t kick in until $520 (about -1.40%)

direction.summary: VoEx out of Propagation Zone, supportive hedging, GTM turning positive and short-gamma push exhausted; bullish outlook.
direction.conditions: Purchasing support diminishes if IV rises significantly; QQQ VoEx-trend flagged as concerning for Divergence.

notes: Author notes this bullish print is 'not what we were expecting a week ago' — prior week's bearish call missed. Ends with admin note on data-processing rework.

direction.summary: VoEx in BUPO for SPY, well within Stability for both; supportive purchasing environment, calm gamma data; smooth bullish sailing expected.
direction.conditions: Some support diminishment if IV rises too much on QQQ; VoEx-daily could be a local peak.
direction.quote: Overall, calm waters and bullish outlooks abound.

direction.summary: Medium-term bullish (BUPO in effect) but elevated near-term pullback risk from VoEx-daily spikes, weak SPY hedging support, negative DLP activity.
direction.conditions: VoEx-daily spiking toward Propagation Zone and minimally supportive SPY hedging could produce near-term downside turbulence.
direction.quote: Overall, bullish outlooks on the medium-term with bearish turbulence expected in the interim.

notes: Deliberately short report ('practicing brevity'); split-horizon call with bullish primary stance and expected near-term pullback.
